series_metadata.series_description: Job and Family Services, Office of Unemployment Insurance records have a historical value dating back to the 1930's, Unemployment Insurance Operations Program (UIO) includes: Fact-finding guide cards, guide books, VHS tapes, historical newspaper articles, awards and letters.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain 5 years, then transfer to State Archivists for Archival review., Paper: Shred
